explanation:
This function is a Spring MVC controller method that handles HTTP GET requests at the "/vets.html" endpoint. It takes two parameters - an integer "page", which defaults to 1 if not provided in the request, and a Model object for data binding.

The function starts by creating a new Vets object (which presumably is some kind of collection or container for vet information). Then it calls a method `findPaginated(page)` that likely returns a Page<Vet> object representing paginated results of veterinary staff. This page is added to the vets list in the Vets object.

Finally, the function calls another method `addPaginationModel(page, paginated, model)` which presumably adds some additional information to the Model that will be used by a view for rendering. The returned value of this call (presumably a string representing the name of a view) is then returned from this function as well.

The complexity of 1 indicates that there are one decision points in the code, and the lines of code are 6 indicating that it contains six statements.
